title: Horror$Place Persona Contract Schema v1
description: Schema for defining AI persona characteristics, state spaces, constraints, and metric targets, compliant with the Rivers of Blood Charter and the Archivist state machine principles.

persona_id.description: Unique identifier for the persona contract.

description.description: Brief description of the persona's role and nature.

archetype.description: Broad category of the persona, influencing base behavior patterns.

tier.description: Safety tier as defined by the Rivers of Blood Charter.

state_space.description: Defines the numerical ranges for key persona attributes.

information_density.description: How much information the persona presents at once.

contradiction_budget.description: For Archivist-type personas; how much internal conflict is allowed.

historical_veracity.description: How closely the persona adheres to documented history.

spectral_coherence.description: For spectral-type personas; how stable their presence is.

dissolution_rate.description: Rate at which the persona fades or fragments under stress.

constraints.description: List of specific behavioral constraints for the persona.

metric_targets.description: Desired impact of the persona on entertainment metrics.

invariant_preferences.description: Preferred invariant values for optimal persona performance.
